/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Basis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Matrix2x2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/TriangleEntity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/Vector2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/View.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o MainEngine   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.1/lib -lsfml-graphics.3.0.1 -lsfml-window.3.0.1 -lsfml-system.3.0.1
